title: Kids Night Light Squishy Dinosaur Nightlight for Kids Room 7 Color Changing Children Bedside Lamp Portable Rechargeable Touch Dimmable Baby Silicone Cute Night Light Dinosaur Lamp for Boys Girls
features: Dinosaur Baby Night Light: Delight your kids with this cute dinosaur night light featuring a soft and durable silicone construction. Its drop-proof design ensures longevity, while the charming appearance and comfortable texture make it irresistible to children. Perfect as a bedside night light, room decoration.

Adjustable Lighting with 7 Color Changing: Simply tap the dinosaur's head to switch between 7 vibrant colors and adjust the brightness according to your preference. 2 lighting modes available: warm light mode & multicolor light mode. Create a soothing atmosphere for your child's bedtime routine, helping them relax and drift off into a peaceful sleep.

Perfect Bedtime Companion: Say goodbye to bedtime battles with this gentle and comforting night light. The soft, non-glaring light is gentle on your child's eyes, providing a sense of security and tranquility throughout the night. It's the ideal companion for ensuring your child enjoys sweet dreams every night.

Long-lasting Rechargeable Battery: Equipped with a high-capacity 2000mAh battery, this night light offers extended usage time on a single charge. Convenient USB charging ensures hassle-free power replenishment, allowing your child to enjoy uninterrupted sleep throughout the night.

Great Gift Idea for Kids: Whether for your own child, a friend, or a loved one, this adorable dinosaur night light makes for a fantastic gift. Perfect for birthdays, Children's Day, Christmas, Halloween, or New Year celebrations, it's sure to bring joy and delight to any recipient.
